name: @astramindapp/openclaw-mind
description: MIND personal knowledge graph for OpenClaw — 27 tools (171 actions), full canonical parity with @astramindapp/mcp-server v0.19. Auto-recall + auto-capture lifecycle hooks. Memory, life, CRM, knowledge graph, MINDsense emotional intelligence, agents, tickets, document folders with deterministic per-source_type routing (mind_folder_routes) and LLM content-aware picker (mind_folder_suggest), Featured Minds Portal (full admin CRUD over the public marketplace, includes Influencer Factory persona fields: archetype, voice, seed-image, niche-tags, kg-scope, agent-posting), Influencer Factory Command Center (admin-only synthetic-persona fleet — persona CRUD, Nano Banana face anchor + image-to-image variants, ElevenLabs voice library + clone + sample, per-platform bios with LLM drafter, Blotato account registration), multi-MIND accounts. The most complete memory plugin for AI agents.
author: Astra AI <hello@theastraway.com>
